targets.description: Achieve Zero Liquid Discharge across all SAIL plants

initiatives.name: SAIL Green Tiles Plant
initiatives.description: Utilisation of slag for manufacturing green tiles at Bhilai.

scope3Breakdown.note: Scope 3 emission identification is ongoing; partially covered.

enrichment.managementCommentary: Focused on smart steel and sustainable growth. The reporting boundary excludes subsidiaries and focuses on integrated and special steel plants on a standalone basis.

nonCompliance.description: Specific environmental non-compliances mentioned for integrated plants.
nonCompliance.resolution: Corrective actions underway via revamped pollution control equipment.

forwardLooking.description: Expansion of renewable energy footprint and decarbonization

qualitativePolicies.P1_ethics: Policies cover NGRBC principles; ethics monitored by Board.
qualitativePolicies.P3_ohs: 100% of plants and offices assessed for health and safety practices.
qualitativePolicies.P6_environment: Dedicated environmental management division oversees restoration and treatment.

steelProduction.note: From plan config. Gemini derived ~19.67M t from emissions/intensity.
